movie.actors: Gerard Butler, Christopher Plummer, Jonny Lee Miller, Justine Waddell
movie.plot: A group of thieves breaks into a chamber expecting to find paintings, but instead they release the count himself, who travels to New Orleans to find his nemesis' daughter, Mary Van Helsing.
movie.title: Dracula 2000
movie.writer: Joel Soisson (story), Patrick Lussier (story), Joel Soisson (screenplay)
